old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-iay5","title":"packet_hash standardization left inconsistent SHA256 computation in simulation.py RX paths","description":"After standardization edit, TX uses hashlib.sha256(payload).digest()[:16].hex() (32-char hex for 16 bytes) at simulation.py:606 but RX paths at :877 and :967 use .hexdigest()[:16] (16-char string = 8 bytes). This breaks sent/received hash matching in NodeMetrics for cross-impl verification and within-sim metrics. Tests pass superficially but correctness is broken. See python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py:877,967 and metrics.py:53,65. Cross-check with Rust hetero_node.rs:146,177 which uses 16-byte prefix bytes.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T14:46:21.316639203Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T14:46:21.316639203Z","labels":["codereview"]}
